gate.reason: Stage 3E package is ready for user-initiated manual ChatGPT major-stage review

manual_chatgpt_review_prompt: Manual ChatGPT major-stage review request for Stage 3. Public GitHub repo: https://github.com/leon-hxy/agentic_etf_desk. Branch: stage/stage3-data-backtest. review_target_commit: 4bdf83bc37d9a43d4535e5750617a1d13a9b5b4f. Review package: reports/major_reviews/stage3/latest.md and reports/major_reviews/stage3/latest.json. Review request: reports/review_requests/latest.md and reports/review_requests/latest.json. Handoff: reports/codex_handoff/latest.md and reports/codex_handoff/latest.json. Scope: ETF-only Stage 3 data source, data quality, backtest validation, and strategy evidence. Do not treat sample evidence as investment basis. Final trading is manually decided by the user. 最终交易由用户手动决定，系统不会自动下单。
